meta.player_source: Wikipedia 2026 World Cup squads (caps & international goals)

method.scoreline: Dixon-Coles team strengths + Poisson score grid
method.scorer: international goals/caps, shrunk to a position prior (K=8 caps)
method.assist: position-based estimate (no public international assist data)
method.default_xi: most-capped player per position in a 4-3-3 (editable)
method.venue: neutral by default; hosts (USA/Canada/Mexico) get home advantage

meta.note: Research demo. Team layer is backtested; scorer/assist layers are history/prior-based and not validated on 2026 outcomes.
